drd_expression: CASE WHEN TXN.SRC_STM_ID = 5 AND APA.AC_ID IS NOT NULL THEN ORIG_AR_AC_SUBDIM.AC_NUM ELSE ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_DIM.ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_ID END
drd_rule:
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
join ccal_repl_owner.apa apa on apa.exec_id = t.txn_id
 
WHEN txn.src_stm_id = 5 (RJBNK1) and apa.ac_id is not null (NOTE: APA on ESP activity is always APACSH defined on [ETL Notes] tab)
THEN
left join ccsi_owner.ar_ac_subdim aas ON 
aas.ar_id = t.ar_id 
AND aas.dep_ac_setup_id = apa.ac_id
and aas.eff_dt <= t.td
and aas.end_dt > t.td
use aas.AC_NUM
ELSE
ccal_repl_owner.txn t
left join ccsi_owner.ar_dim ard ON ard.AR_ID = t.AR_ID
and ard.eff_dt <= t.td
and ard.end_dt > t.td
use ard.ORIG_SRC_STM_AR_ID

Else join ccsi_owner.AR_GRP_SUBDIM asd ON asd.AR_ID = t.AR_ID
and t.td >= asd.EFF_DT
and t.td < asd.END_DT
and populate with asd.LINKED_BKR_AR_ID

drd_rule:
Use APACSH logic from 'ETL Notes' tab.

For a Transaction, If 2 APACSH records exists
     If (one record is 'APACSH04' & other is 'APACSH11') 
          then skip 'APACSH04' record and load 'APACSH11' but use the values to
          populate sales charge attributes from 'APACSH04' for 5 attributes (Sales Charge Rate Multiplier Number, Sales Charge Rate, Sales Charge Rate Type Code, Sales Charge Rate Type Id, Sales Charge Rate Type Name)
     else exception entire transaction

join ccal_repl_owner.apa ap ON ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
left join ccal_repl_owner.cl_val cv ON AP.APA_TP_ID = cv.CL_VAL_ID AND
CASE    WHEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE_TP_ID = 2507 
            THEN AP.SALE_CHRG_RATE

JOIN ccsi_owner.ar_grp_subdim ar_grp_subdim ON ar_grp_subdim.ar_id = t.ar_id
AND  t.td >= ar_grp_subdim.eff_dt
AND  t.td < ar_grp_subdim.end_dt
join ccsi_owner.ar_dim bkr_ar_dim on ar_grp_subdim.linked_bkr_ar_id = bkr_ar_dim.ar_id
AND  t.td >= ar_dim.eff_dt
AND  t.td < ar_dim.end_dt
JOIN ssds_dal_owner.fa_number_v fa_number_v1 ON UPPER(TRIM((bkr_ar_dim.own_bsn_ent_cd) = fa_number_v1.fa_number
AND  t.td >= fa_number_v1.effective_date
AND  t.td < fa_number_v1.end_date
Join ssds_dal_owner.ENTERPRISE_ENTITY_DIM_V own_fa_ent on own_fa_ent.entity_code_long = fa_number_v1.fa_number_entity_code
AND t.td >= own_fa_ent.effective_date
AND t.td < own_fa_ent.end_date
AND own_fa_ent.entity_recycled_boolean  = 0
AND own_fa_ent.entity_financial_ria_boolean  = 0

Driving source:
from TRANSACTIONS_STG_OWNER.#SSDS.SSDS_AVY_FACT_STEP5_STG AVY_FACT_STEP5_STG_RT
notes: Used DRD source attribute; join must be implemented from AD rule.

drd_rule:
JOIN ccal_repl_owner.txn t with ccal_repl_owner.Apa ap on ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
JOIN ccal_repl_owner.ccal_cird_pd_map ccal_cird_pd_map on ON ap.pd_id = ccal_cird_pd_map.ccal_pd_id
ND ccal_cird_pd_map.actv_f = 'Y'
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim  imt_pd_dim1 on ap.pd_id = imt_pd_dim1.cird_pd_id (-- cird_pd-based dimension (only used when src_stm_id = 93))
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim1.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim1.end_dt
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim  imt_pd_dim ON  ap.pd_id = imt_pd_dim.ccal_pd_id (ccal_pd-based dimension)
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim.end_dt
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim imt_pd_dim_cird ON ccal_cird_pd_map.cird_pd_id = imt_pd_dim_cird.cird_pd_id (Dimension via mapped cird_pd)
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim_cird.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim_cird.end_dt;

notes: Used DRD source attribute; join must be implemented from AD rule.

drd_rule:
JOIN ccal_repl_owner.txn t with ccal_repl_owner.Apa ap on ap.exec_id = t.txn_id
JOIN ccal_repl_owner.ccal_cird_pd_map ccal_cird_pd_map on ON ap.pd_id = ccal_cird_pd_map.ccal_pd_id
ND ccal_cird_pd_map.actv_f = 'Y'
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim  imt_pd_dim1 on ap.pd_id = imt_pd_dim1.cird_pd_id (-- cird_pd-based dimension (only used when src_stm_id = 93))
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim1.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim1.end_dt
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim  imt_pd_dim ON  ap.pd_id = imt_pd_dim.ccal_pd_id (ccal_pd-based dimension)
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim.end_dt
JOIN cird_owner.imt_pd_dim imt_pd_dim_cird ON ccal_cird_pd_map.cird_pd_id = imt_pd_dim_cird.cird_pd_id (Dimension via mapped cird_pd)
AND t.td >= imt_pd_dim_cird.eff_dt
AND t.td < imt_pd_dim_cird.end_dt;
